Home / Services / Door Installation

Door Installation

Secure and stylish door installation services for your Bakersfield property.

Legends Glass Inc. specializes in professional door installation services for homes and businesses throughout Bakersfield. We understand that doors are more than just entryways; they're crucial for security, insulation, and curb appeal. Whether you're looking to upgrade your front door, install a new patio door, or replace an interior door, we've got you covered. We work with a wide range of door materials, including wood, fiberglass, and steel, ensuring we can match your style and budget. Our experienced installers pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper alignment, sealing, and weatherproofing to withstand Bakersfield's harsh conditions. We also handle the installation of door hardware, including locks, handles, and security systems, providing you with a complete and secure solution. From entry doors to sliding glass doors, Legends Glass Inc. ensures your door installation provides lasting beauty and functionality.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation and Door Selection
  2. 02 Step 2: Precise Measurements and Ordering
  3. 03 Step 3: Old Door Removal and Frame Preparation
  4. 04 Step 4: Professional Installation and Hardware Fitting

Benefits

  • Enhanced Security
  • Improved Energy Efficiency
  • Increased Home Value
  • Enhanced Curb Appeal

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of door is best for security?

Steel doors are generally the most secure option, offering superior resistance to forced entry. We can also install reinforced frames and high-security locks for added protection.

How do I choose the right door style for my home?

We'll guide you through the selection process, considering your architectural style, personal preferences, and budget. We offer a wide range of door styles to complement any home.

Do you install sliding glass doors?

Yes, we specialize in the installation of sliding glass doors, providing you with seamless access to your patio or backyard.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with door installation? Contact us today.
